title: PetGuard
description: Prevents you from accidentally hitting your pets.
body:
PetGuard prevents you from hitting your animals. Works on any tameable mob(wolf, cat, horse etc.).

# Version Support
This plugin should work from 1.7.10 to latest version of minecraft.
## Tested on
- 1.7.10
- 1.8.9
- 1.21.4

# Planned Features
- Message warning.
- Option to prevent all players from hitting tamed animals.

# Feature Request
If you have any feature requests, please let me know by creating a issue on github.
